name: Welcome Back To 2007
short_description: Would you say that 2007 cannot be returned? But after many years, 2007 is coming back to us! Be ready for 2023 achievements! WBT2007 is a old-school platformer game.
detailed_description:
Would you say that 2007 cannot be returned? But after many years, 2007 is coming back to us!

Welcome Back To 2007, is an old-school platformer game.

Features:
■ 2023 beautiful achievements;
■ Original soundtrack by Anacom & Golod;
■ 31 different levels;
■ Cool plot and dialogues;
■ Jetpack working on a real physical model;
■ The final boss fight;
■ 3 Difficulty, leaderboards, controller support;
■ New features are already available!


You play as Emo Boy, who bridge over the difficulties to achieve his sacred wishes. Evil grandmas, chavs, security guards, goths, weeaboos and haters appear on his way. But our EmoBoy will never surrender! With help of tears, literally, he smashes his way: plunge your enemies into shock by shooting them with your tears. You need to collect cigarettes in order to replenish your Jetpack stock! Your main companion and mentor is Girl with Guitar. She will not let you get bored and always will help you with advice on any trouble!
